description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a landscaped plot with a variety of trees, shrubs, and outdoor amenities. The house features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a clean, white facade. The backyard includes a freeform swimming pool with lounge chairs, a trampoline, and a small playhouse or treehouse. The front of the house has a simple entryway with a single door and a few steps leading up to it. The property is surrounded by well-maintained grass and several mature trees, providing shade and privacy. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped grounds featuring a pool, trampoline, and various trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled aerial perspective, highlighting the open backyard, pool, trampoline, and a variety of trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the front, focusing on the main entryway, the lush landscaping, and the dense arrangement of trees in the foreground.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the rear, emphasizing the pool area, outdoor furniture, trampoline, and the back facade with large windows and patio doors.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side view, showcasing the pool, lounge chairs, and the side elevation of the house with its flat roof and multiple windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a single door, a few steps, and no prominent porch or decorative elements
